titleStmt.title: SII 22.52: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 52. (A.R. No. 52 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SUNDARĒŚVARA SHRINE. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (III)—10th YEAR, 299th DAY (A.D. 1225-26)

summary.p: This records an order of the king, issued through his Secretary Mīnavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and other officers, granting the uḷvari (entry in Tax-Register) for 13 vēli of land presented by him tax-free in the village Podimaṅgalam in Kuṟumbūrnāḍu, to the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiyār at Tirukkaḍavūr, for the merit of his queen (Tribhuvanamuḻududaiyāḷ).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravaṟtikaḷ śrīrājarāja
tevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu nāḷ Iru nūṟṟutto
ṉpatiṉāl prasātañ ceytaruḷivanta tirumukappaṭi tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti
koṉerimai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiru
kkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyārkoyil tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmā
heśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañceyvāṉukkum It tevarkku ve
ṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatā
kkut tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷukku naṉṟāka tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy nām nirvāṟta nilattukku Iṉ
ṉāṭṭuk kuṟumpūrnāṭṭu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Iṟukkiṟa neṭuṅ kāṭṭūr
piṟinta potimaṅkalattu vākūruṭaiyāṉpaṟṟeṉṟu veṟu Oṭṭuk koṇṭu
varukiṟa nilam nikki nikki niṉṟa nilattile patiṟṟuveli nilamum Ivaṉ paṟṟeṉṟu
veṟu Oṭṭukkoṇṭu varukiṟa nilattile muveli nilamum pattāvatu pacāṉ
mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭum Iṟa
lavarāyaṉum perunallūruṭaiyāṉum kalvāy talai Uṭaiyāṉum kā
ṇi nikki viṭavum kaṭavatāka variyilārum varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷu
m Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari taraccoṉṉom Innilam pattāvatu pacāṉ
mutal Ittevaṟku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka kaikkoṇṭu niman
tañ celuttappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai miṉavaṉ muve
vantaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai Amarakoṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cetikularāyaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
kāṅkaiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu:—ittirumukappaṭi kalveṭṭiṉa
kaṭavūrācāriyaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
